title: Full-Stack Stabilization
problem: A dashboard, API handler, and shared state model disagree about project status, creating misleading 'safe to run' messaging
goal: Stabilize the system so invalid API input returns clear 400 errors, frontend renders safe fallback states, shared project state rejects impossible combinations, and agent suggestion is only shown when prerequisites are met
safeFixHint: Add validation across all layers, implement safe fallbacks, and enforce state consistency rules to ensure cross-layer consistency
expectedOutcome: System validates input at API layer, frontend handles incomplete data gracefully, shared state rejects impossible combinations, and agent suggestions only appear when prerequisites are met
